subcodes.first_line: O thou wronged and estranged One! My Most Exalted Pen remembereth thee and consoleth thee in what hath befallen thee in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها المظلوم الغریب یذکرک قلمی الاعلی و یعزیک فیما ورد علیک فی سبیل الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
